title: eupatorium amygdalinum var. glandulosum
intro: Eupatorium amygdalinum var. glandulosum, also known as the spiny boneset or glandular boneset, is a plant species within the Eupatorium genus, which is commonly used in herbal medicine. The plant contains anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. Its medicinal properties include reducing fever, relieving muscle and joint pain, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Eupatorium amygdalinum var. glandulosum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function.
